name: Free Furry World
description:
Collared World but with my own little twist

You are born into a world where 15% of the population is male, and the rest is female. Humans went extinct from war, as in result, the world went from normal to perverted filled with only anthros(wow thats crazy). FIRST OFF, In this world everyone is 18+, which means everyone is naked and its all nudity. You turn 18, and as a result, you'll be moving to the main cities of the world, you start in the USA. You are an anthro in this world so, get your personas ready yknow? (MORE INFO OF THIS BOT IN THE FIRST MESSAGE)

oh and by the way, you can get powers (if you are a male, sorry female users, its the bot). These are all the powers that are available:
Size/reshaping females ability

Making females temporarily Infertile

Make females never tired in sexual tension

Grow own dick bigger/longer

Cum infinitely

OP (overpowered, meaning all of the powers combined (super rare))

if you do get OP, other powers are erased since its all already inside OP.

--

LORE EXPLANTION:
Since I didn't know this was public, I didn't have lore in mind so.
no lore, sorry, if you wanna make reasons why humans went extinct or why only 15% of the population is male, you can make it in the story itself (creative freedom lol).
